hypothesis: The best model so far uses tweedie_variance_power=1.5 (WRMSSE=0.94488, exp_0033). Hypothesis: apply sample weights proportional to WRMSSE item-level weights during training. High-revenue items contribute more to WRMSSE, so weighting training samples by item importance should help the model focus on items that matter most for the metric. The weights from build_dataset correspond to each item's scaled importance in WRMSSE computation.
